summary: Made two surgical seam edits: reframed the opening around the emptied classroom rather than Thea's arrival at the doorway, and tightened the late-chapter transition so Cora's planned confrontation with August carries more directly into the next chapter.
edits: Rewrote the opening paragraph to start inside the schoolroom, preserving the same information while avoiding a repeated dusty public-building arrival scaffold.
Adjusted Thea's late decision paragraph to mention Cora's questions for August, strengthening the handoff into chapter 09's bank scene.
